metadata.title: FlowDockr for Copywriters
metadata.description: Negotiation, scope, and pricing workflows tailored for freelance copywriters.

hero.title: Copywriting projects need stronger intent and revision guardrails.
hero.description: Use Deal to align value, Scope to control rewrites, and Pricing to package outcomes.

features.title: Copywriter risk map
features.description: Where margin and project clarity usually drop.

items.title: Unlimited rewrites
items.description: Separate refinement rounds from strategic repositioning.

items.title: Strategy requests outside brief
items.description: Treat new channels and audiences as change requests.

items.title: Price pressure on word count
items.description: Frame pricing around business outcomes, not character volume.

cta.title: Set project rules before draft one.
cta.description: Strong early boundaries reduce rewrite loops later.
